hero.title: Study Planner
hero.description: Turn learning goals into a clear, manageable study plan.

differences.title: Study plans that stay practical
differences.description: Break large learning goals into clear sessions that are easier to complete.

items.title: Goal-first planning
items.description: Keep each study activity connected to a clear outcome.

items.title: Manageable sessions
items.description: Turn broad subjects into focused blocks of work.

items.title: Simple review
items.description: See what is planned, completed, and still ahead.

feel.title: A calmer path through the syllabus
feel.description: The planner keeps attention on the next useful study action.

items.title: Define the outcome
items.description: Start with what you want to understand or complete.

items.title: Plan realistic sessions
items.description: Create focused blocks that fit available time.

items.title: Review and adjust
items.description: Keep the plan useful as priorities change.

audiences.title: Who uses Study Planner
audiences.description: Useful for structured learning at any stage.

items.title: Students
items.description: Organize coursework, revision, and exam preparation.

items.title: Self learners
items.description: Maintain momentum across independent learning goals.

resourceSection.title: Planning building blocks
resourceSection.description: Keep goals, sessions, and review points connected.

items.title: Learning goals
items.description: Define the outcome behind the plan.

items.title: Study sessions
items.description: Break work into practical focused blocks.

items.title: Progress review
items.description: Check completion and adjust the next steps.

groupedSection.title: Ways to structure study
groupedSection.description: Use familiar planning groups for different learning needs.

items.name: Sessions
items.description: Set practical blocks for focused work.

items.name: Completion
items.description: Track which planned work is finished.

technicalSection.title: Built for reusable learning plans
technicalSection.description: Study Planner follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.

finalCta.title: Ready to make the study plan?
finalCta.description: Start with one learning goal and build the next useful sessions.
